name: Ranko
description:
What Rannko Does?

With Rannko, businesses can streamline their online reputation management tasks, engage with customers effectively across various platforms, optimize their local SEO efforts, and make data-driven decisions to enhance their online visibility and reputation.

Source: G2

‍

Features:

➡️ Allows businesses to monitor and manage online reviews across multiple platforms from a single dashboard.

➡️ Social Media Management: Provides tools for scheduling and publishing social media posts, as well as monitoring social media mentions.

➡️ Listing Management: Helps businesses manage and update their business listings across various online directories and platforms.

➡️ Reputation Monitoring: Monitors online reputation by tracking reviews, ratings, and mentions across the web.

➡️ Competitor Analysis: Provides insights into competitors' online presence, including their reviews, ratings, and social media performance.

➡️ Local SEO Optimization: Offers tools and guidance for improving local search engine optimization (SEO) to increase visibility in local search results.

➡️ Reporting and Analytics: Generates reports and analytics to track online performance, including review sentiment, social media engagement, and local SEO rankings.

Benefits:

⭐️ Streamlines online reputation management tasks by consolidating them into a single platform.

⭐️ Helps businesses maintain a positive online reputation by monitoring and responding to reviews and mentions.

⭐️ Enables businesses to engage with customers through timely responses to reviews and social media interactions.

⭐️ Provides insights into competitors' online strategies, allowing businesses to differentiate themselves and stay ahead.

⭐️ Optimizes online presence through local SEO optimization and accurate business listings, leading to increased visibility in search results.

⭐️ Offers actionable insights from reporting and analytics, empowering businesses to make informed decisions about their online strategy.

⭐️ Offers a comprehensive suite of tools for managing various aspects of online presence, from reviews and social media to local SEO, in one platform.

Pros: 

✅API live sync

Cons: 

❌Can be a little difficult and slow to navigate

‍

Pricing at $49 Per Month - Listings Management Only
